'''Marshian''' was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon's]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[19 ABY/Legends|fifteen years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He was stationed on the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
